headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: res.cloudinary.com *.cloudinary.com image.tmdb.org *.supabase.co; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' *.supabase.co *.cloudinary.com api.upcitemdb.com api.themoviedb.org vitals.vercel-insights.com; frame-src 'self' challenges.cloudflare.com;
